Policy name: Division policy manual and Saskatchewan public tender route
Policy URL: https://www.chinooksd.ca/ — policy/manual search required for fundraising, sponsorship, facility use and logo permission.; https://sasktenders.ca/
Relevant summary: Public school divisions govern contracts, school-generated funds, facilities, branding and purchasing through division policies and delegated administrative procedures.
Likely impact on Bloom Boys: A small school-level pilot may begin informally with the principal, but contracts, division-wide arrangements, logo use, insurance or revenue sharing may trigger division review.
Approval likely required from: Principal/graduation organizer first; finance/operations or procurement for formal terms; director only for strategic escalation.
Insurance requirement: Exact commercial general-liability limits were not publicly standardized across divisions; written confirmation is required.
Branding restriction: School/division names, logos and apparel designs require written permission.
Fundraising restriction: Fundraising or revenue-sharing may need school-community-council and division financial approval.
Procurement requirement: SaskTenders or vendor setup may apply depending on value and structure; do not assume a small event licence requires a tender.
Venue requirement: If the ceremony is off-site, the venue’s written vendor and loading rules also apply.

Policy name: Education authority and community protocols
Policy URL: https://sktc.sk.ca/
Relevant summary: Indigenous education authorities and First Nations may use local governance, education-department and community protocols rather than provincial school-division procedures.
Likely impact on Bloom Boys: Bloom Boys must seek respectful local approval and avoid assuming a standard school-division procurement route.
Approval likely required from: Education authority, school leadership, local community governance and venue.
Insurance requirement: Insurance requirements require direct confirmation.
Branding restriction: Community, Nation and school identity use requires express permission.
Fundraising restriction: Revenue sharing or fundraising must be approved locally.
Procurement requirement: Procurement process is organization-specific and not publicly verified.
Venue requirement: Community or host-venue approval is likely.

Policy name: Education authority and community protocols
Policy URL: https://pagc.sk.ca/
Relevant summary: Indigenous education authorities and First Nations may use local governance, education-department and community protocols rather than provincial school-division procedures.
Likely impact on Bloom Boys: Bloom Boys must seek respectful local approval and avoid assuming a standard school-division procurement route.
Approval likely required from: Education authority, school leadership, local community governance and venue.
Insurance requirement: Insurance requirements require direct confirmation.
Branding restriction: Community, Nation and school identity use requires express permission.
Fundraising restriction: Revenue sharing or fundraising must be approved locally.
Procurement requirement: Procurement process is organization-specific and not publicly verified.
Venue requirement: Community or host-venue approval is likely.

Policy name: Event-planner and venue rules
Policy URL: https://tcuplace.com/planners/
Relevant summary: Event managers coordinate setup, client requirements, facility access and services.
Likely impact on Bloom Boys: Even with school approval, Bloom Boys needs venue approval for placement, load-in, insurance, signage and possible fees.
Approval likely required from: TCU Place Event Sales plus school/event client
Insurance requirement: Request certificate limits from assigned manager.
Branding restriction: School logos remain subject to school/division permission.
Fundraising restriction: Event-client fundraising terms require school approval.
Procurement requirement: Venue licence rather than public-school procurement may apply.
Venue requirement: Venue approval is essential; in-house services may affect operations.

Policy name: Event spaces and FAQ
Policy URL: https://conexusartscentre.ca/faqs/
Relevant summary: The venue publishes an outside food/beverage restriction; complete non-food retail terms are not public.
Likely impact on Bloom Boys: Flowers and keepsakes are non-food, but written approval is still required for lobby sales, setup and any commission.
Approval likely required from: Conexus event management plus school/event client
Insurance requirement: Request event-specific insurance limits.
Branding restriction: School branding requires school/division permission.
Fundraising restriction: School controls fundraising purpose; venue controls facility activity.
Procurement requirement: Event licence/fee may apply.
Venue requirement: Venue approval may matter as much as school approval for Regina graduations.

Policy name: Bookings and rates
Policy URL: https://merlisbelsherplace.ca/bookings-and-rates-at-merlis-belcher-place/
Relevant summary: Venue booking staff control facility access, event setup and rates.
Likely impact on Bloom Boys: School approval alone does not authorize a commercial stand inside the facility.
Approval likely required from: Merlis Belsher Place booking plus school/division client
Insurance requirement: Request event-specific certificate limits.
Branding restriction: School/division branding approval remains required.
Fundraising restriction: School/division controls revenue-sharing purpose.
Procurement requirement: USask procurement may apply for university-owned events.
Venue requirement: Written venue approval and assigned load-in instructions are required.

Policy name: Event booking contact
Policy URL: https://prairielandpark.com/contact/
Relevant summary: Event booking and operations control hall setup and approved vendors.
Likely impact on Bloom Boys: Bloom Boys requires both event-client and venue approval.
Approval likely required from: Prairieland event manager plus school/division client
Insurance requirement: Request certificate limits.
Branding restriction: School/division branding permission is separate.
Fundraising restriction: School approves fundraising/revenue share.
Procurement requirement: Venue agreement may apply.
Venue requirement: Written hall/vendor and load-in terms required.
